name: Dusk Lantern
note: A warm twilight harmony — coral warmth lifted by citron and grounded in deep maroon.

name: Edo Garden
note: Woodblock greens and a single vermilion accent, the classic ukiyo-e contrast.

name: Indigo Stage
note: Deep stage blues with a violet glow, echoing a midnight gig poster.

name: Tea House
note: Quiet earthen neutrals — drab, cream and seal brown for a calm interior.

name: Koi Pond
note: Nile blue water broken by darting vermilion and apricot koi.

name: Festival Banner
note: High-key festival color: orange rufous, citron and emerald shouting together.

name: Plum Blossom
note: Soft pinks against pansy purple, a gentle late-winter bloom.

name: Harvest Field
note: Olive, naples yellow and ocher red — late-autumn agriculture.
